episodes.title: Inside the Order of the Solar Temple Death Cult
episodes.description: Send us Fan Mail In the 1990s, members of the Order of the Solar Temple were found dead across multiple countries in a series of shocking ritualistic deaths that stunned the world. What began as a secretive spiritual movement quickly spiraled into paranoia, manipulation, and tragedy. Em and Jenn uncover the dark beliefs, mysterious leaders, and horrifying events behind one of history’s most disturbing cults. Support the show

episodes.title: Horror From Down Under: The Family Cult
episodes.description:
Send us Fan Mail (https://www.buzzsprout.com/221526/fan_mail/new) 


Today on Wheel of Crime, Jenn and Em dive into The Family Cult, a disturbing Australian New Age group led by Anne Hamilton-Byrne. Claiming to be the reincarnation of Jesus, she built a secretive and controlling community that hid shocking abuse behind a spiritual facade. 


Support the show (https://www.patreon.com/Wheelofcrime)
